title: Ravage & Cabbage
body:
![Ravager stable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/m6BMFidq/images/2cd19275aaa4e7ae14e4a96d01c262274387718d.png)

Ravage & Cabbage
---
**Ravage & Cabbage** is a small mod that aims to expand Ravagers in a fun way, as well as add other small and interesting features!

This mod's main focus is on ravagers. Features for them include milking stunned ravagers, finding baby ravagers in a brand new structure, and taming/riding your very own ravager!

Some of the other features include cabbage, a new crop with some...mysterious properties, a new type of illager that hurls cabbage at the player- the cabbager, and corrupted villagers!
